benefits.description: Semaglutide provided superior appetite suppression and food noise reduction compared to Retatrutide; at times forgot to eat on Semaglutide
User maintains meals and portion control with Retatrutide, noting appetite still under control but with cravings compared to none on Semaglutide

side_effects.description: Increased cravings with Retatrutide compared to Semaglutide which suppressed appetite completely

protocol_notes: Transitioned from Semaglutide to Retatrutide after 9 months on Semaglutide. Took two-week break between compounds. Considering adding Cagrisema to help with appetite suppression. Notes Retatrutide is a superior GLP-1/GCG/GIP triple agonist versus Semaglutide's GLP-1 agonism alone. Planning to increase Retatrutide dose to improve appetite suppression.
